summary.en: USD liquidity has moved from 'short-term tightening' to 'tightening with transmission' — the stress is now showing up in yields and volatility, not just balance sheet mechanics. Net liquidity drained $306B over two weeks. Bank reserves below $3T. Fed repo lending elevated. Critically, the yield curve is now confirming the tightening: 2Y at 3.908% and 10Y at 4.292% are both rising, which means the liquidity drain is transmitting into real borrowing costs. The TGA inflection is still expected mid-May, but the market is not waiting patiently.
summary.zh: 美元流动性已从「短期紧缩」升级为「紧缩传导」——压力现在不仅体现在资产负债表机制上，还体现在收益率和波动率上。净流动性两周抽水 3060 亿美元。银行准备金低于 3 万亿美元。美联储回购贷款偏高。关键是，收益率曲线现在正在确认紧缩：2Y 3.908% 和 10Y 4.292% 都在上升，这意味着流动性抽水正在传导至实际借贷成本。TGA 拐点仍预计 5 月中旬，但市场没有耐心等待。

rrp_note.en: Effectively zero — no meaningful liquidity buffer remains
rrp_note.zh: 实际归零——无实质性流动性缓冲

tga_note.en: +$227.4B WoW — at seasonal peak, unwind expected mid-May
tga_note.zh: 周环比 +2274 亿美元——处于季节性顶部，预计 5 月中旬回落

net_liquidity_change.zh: -2150 亿美元（周环比）/ -3060 亿美元（两周）——紧缩已传导至收益率

details.en: The critical shift today is that liquidity tightening is no longer just a balance sheet story — it is now transmitting into market prices. Rising yields (2Y +3.908%, 10Y +4.292%), surging VIX (19.50, intraday above 20), and oil rebounding to $90.61 are all consistent with a tightening liquidity environment. The Trump-Powell conflict adds a policy uncertainty premium on top. Tomorrow's H.4.1 release will be the key data point: if TGA starts to decline, the narrative shifts. If TGA holds or rises further, the tightening pressure intensifies.
details.zh: 今天的关键转变是，流动性紧缩不再只是资产负债表故事——它现在正在传导至市场价格。收益率上升（2Y +3.908%，10Y +4.292%）、VIX 飙升（19.50，盘中突破 20）、油价反弹至 $90.61，都与流动性紧缩环境一致。Trump-Powell 冲突在此之上增加了政策不确定性溢价。明天的 H.4.1 数据将是关键数据点：如果 TGA 开始下降，叙事将转变。如果 TGA 维持或进一步上升，紧缩压力将加剧。

reason.en: Net liquidity drained $306B over two weeks. Bank reserves at $2.98T below $3T threshold. Fed repo lending elevated. Critically, yields are now rising in confirmation: 2Y at 3.908% and 10Y at 4.292%. The tightening is no longer just mechanical — it is transmitting into real borrowing costs. Score reduced from 40 to 38 as transmission is confirmed. TGA inflection (mid-May) remains the catalyst for improvement.
reason.zh: 净流动性两周抽水 3060 亿美元。银行准备金 2.98 万亿美元低于 3 万亿美元门槛。美联储回购贷款偏高。关键是，收益率现在正在上升确认：2Y 3.908%，10Y 4.292%。紧缩不再只是机械性的——它正在传导至实际借贷成本。由于传导已确认，分数从 40 降至 38。TGA 拐点（5 月中旬）仍是改善的催化剂。

reason.en: 88% beat rate, Q1 earnings growth at 13.2% — fundamentals remain strong. However, Forward P/E at 20.9x is stretched, and beat-and-drop continues across healthcare and financials. The critical test tonight: Tesla after-hours. If Tesla beats but drops, beat-and-drop has officially spread to mega-cap tech and the earnings support narrative breaks. Score reduced from 68 to 65 as cracks are widening.
reason.zh: 超预期率 88%，Q1 盈利增长 13.2%——基本面依然强劲。但前瞻市盈率 20.9 倍偏高，「超预期后下跌」在医疗和金融板块持续。今晚的关键测试：Tesla 盘后财报。如果 Tesla 超预期但下跌，「超预期后下跌」已正式扩散至大型科技股，盈利支撑叙事将破裂。由于裂缝在扩大，分数从 68 降至 65。

reason.en: Breadth has deteriorated from the 60% threshold back to approximately 57%. Russell 2000 led declines at -1.00% — small caps are the most sensitive to liquidity and credit conditions, and their underperformance is a warning. Financials are the worst-performing sector YTD at -3.93%. European markets declined 1%+ for two consecutive days, signaling global risk-off. The WSJ 'Bad Breadth' warning is being confirmed. Score reduced from 55 to 48.
reason.zh: 广度从 60% 门槛恶化至约 57%。Russell 2000 领跌 -1.00%——小盘股对流动性和信用状况最敏感，其跑输是一个警告。金融板块是年初至今表现最差的板块，跌幅 -3.93%。欧洲市场连续两天下跌 1%+，发出全球风险规避信号。《华尔街日报》的「广度不足」警告正在被确认。分数从 55 降至 48。

reason.en: S&P 500 declined for two consecutive days (-0.28% then -0.63%), now at 7,064. VIX rose to 19.50 with intraday breach of 20 — a VIX above 20 sustained would trigger institutional de-risking. Oil rebounded from $82.59 to $90.61 (+9.7% off lows), adding inflation pressure and reversing last week's rate cut expectations. DXY at 98.37 — dollar strengthening despite Trump-Powell conflict. Score reduced from 42 to 35 as multiple price signals are now negative simultaneously.
reason.zh: 标普 500 连续两天下跌（-0.28% 后 -0.63%），现在在 7,064。VIX 升至 19.50，盘中突破 20——持续在 20 以上将触发机构自动减仓。油价从 $82.59 反弹至 $90.61（从低点 +9.7%），增加通胀压力并逆转上周的降息预期。DXY 98.37——尽管有 Trump-Powell 冲突，美元仍在走强。由于多个价格信号同时转负，分数从 42 降至 35。

trading_summary.en:
46.0 — Low Conviction. Wind has shifted. Last week: strong earnings + breadth improving. This week: liquidity tightening transmitting + VIX surging + oil rebounding + yields rising + breadth sliding + Trump attacking Fed. Negative factors accumulating fast.

Cut to 45% equity. Today's keys: Tesla after-hours (does beat-and-drop spread to mega-tech?) + tomorrow's H.4.1 data (TGA inflection confirmed or denied?). Preserve capital, wait for clarity.
trading_summary.zh:
46分，Low Conviction。风向变了。上周是盈利强劲 + 广度改善，这周是流动性紧缩传导 + VIX 连升 + 油价反弹 + 收益率上升 + 广度下滑 + Trump 攻击 Fed。负面因素快速累积。

降至 45% 仓位。今天关键：Tesla 盘后财报（beat and drop 是否扩散到大型科技）+ 明天 H.4.1 数据（TGA 拐点确认或否认）。保存资本，等风向明确。

trading_quote: The most important thing is to preserve capital and wait for the fat pitch.

note.en: Second consecutive decline — approaching 7,000 support level
note.zh: 连续第二天下跌——接近 7,000 支撑位

note.en: Tesla after-hours earnings tonight are the key catalyst
note.zh: 今晚 Tesla 盘后财报是关键催化剂

note.en: Broad-based decline across all major indices
note.zh: 所有主要指数全面下跌

note.en: Small caps leading decline — most sensitive to liquidity conditions
note.zh: 小盘股领跌——对流动性状况最敏感

note.en: Yield rising confirms liquidity tightening transmission
note.zh: 收益率上升确认流动性紧缩传导

note.en: Short-end rising — rate cut expectations being reversed
note.zh: 短端上升——降息预期正在被逆转

note.en: Dollar strengthening despite Trump-Powell conflict — risk-off dynamics
note.zh: 尽管有 Trump-Powell 冲突，美元仍走强——风险规避动态

note.en: Holding strong — safe haven demand + dollar credibility concerns
note.zh: 守稳——避险需求 + 美元信誉担忧

note.en: Rebounding from $82.59 lows — Middle East ceasefire expiring, inflation risk rising
note.zh: 从 $82.59 低点反弹——中东停火到期，通胀风险上升

note.en: Holding above $75K — resilient amid equity weakness
note.zh: 守住 $75K 上方——在股市走弱中表现韧性

note.en: Intraday breach of 20 — sustained above 20 triggers institutional de-risking
note.zh: 盘中突破 20——持续 20 以上触发机构自动减仓

analysis.en: BTC +0.41% to $76,434, holding above $75K while equities declined. This relative resilience is notable — BTC is increasingly decoupling from equity risk-off and correlating more with gold as a dollar-credibility hedge. Fear & Greed at 52 (Neutral) shows balanced sentiment. Exchange net outflows continue, suggesting holders are not selling. The key level to watch: $75,000 support. If equities continue to decline and BTC holds $75K, it strengthens the safe-haven narrative.
analysis.zh: BTC +0.41% 至 $76,434，在股市下跌时守住 $75K 上方。这种相对韧性值得注意——BTC 越来越从股市风险规避中脱钩，更多地与黄金相关联，作为美元信誉对冲工具。恐惧贪婪指数 52（中性）显示情绪均衡。交易所净流出持续，表明持有者没有抛售。需要关注的关键水平：$75,000 支撑位。如果股市继续下跌而 BTC 守住 $75K，将强化避险叙事。

gold_silver_note.zh: 偏高——结构性看涨逻辑完整

key_driver.en: Safe Haven + Dollar Credibility + Oil Inflation Risk
key_driver.zh: 避险需求 + 美元信誉 + 油价通胀风险

key_driver_detail.en: Trump-Powell conflict + central bank buying + oil rebound to $90.61 + geopolitical risk
key_driver_detail.zh: Trump-Powell 冲突 + 央行购金 + 油价反弹至 $90.61 + 地缘政治风险

analysis.en: Gold +0.79% to $4,757.10, holding strong even as equities decline. Gold is now benefiting from multiple simultaneous tailwinds: (1) safe haven demand from equity weakness, (2) dollar credibility concerns from Trump-Powell conflict, (3) oil rebound to $90.61 adding inflation risk which historically supports gold, (4) continued central bank buying. The gold bull case is strengthening as the macro environment deteriorates. Gold/silver ratio at 88.1 remains historically elevated.
analysis.zh: 黄金 +0.79% 至 $4,757.10，即使股市下跌也守稳。黄金现在同时受益于多个顺风因素：（1）股市走弱带来的避险需求，（2）Trump-Powell 冲突带来的美元信誉担忧，（3）油价反弹至 $90.61 增加通胀风险（历史上对黄金有支撑），（4）央行持续购金。随着宏观环境恶化，黄金看涨逻辑正在强化。金银比 88.1 仍处历史高位。

title.en: Liquidity Tightening Transmission — Yields Rising, VIX Breaching 20
title.zh: 流动性紧缩传导——收益率上升，VIX 突破 20

description.en: Bank reserves below $3T, yields rising (2Y 3.908%, 10Y 4.292%), and VIX hitting 19.50 with an intraday breach of 20. This is the tightening transmission in action. If 10Y breaks above 4.5%, equity valuations (Forward P/E 20.9x) come under severe pressure. A sustained VIX above 20 triggers institutional automatic de-risking protocols. The Trump-Powell conflict is adding a policy uncertainty premium on top of the mechanical liquidity drain. Tomorrow's H.4.1 data is critical — TGA must start declining to break this negative feedback loop.
description.zh: 银行准备金低于 3 万亿美元，收益率上升（2Y 3.908%，10Y 4.292%），VIX 升至 19.50 盘中突破 20。这是紧缩传导在实际发生。如果 10Y 突破 4.5%，股票估值（前瞻市盈率 20.9 倍）将面临严重压力。VIX 持续在 20 以上将触发机构自动减仓协议。Trump-Powell 冲突在机械性流动性抽水之上增加了政策不确定性溢价。明天的 H.4.1 数据至关重要——TGA 必须开始下降才能打破这个负面反馈循环。

title.en: Oil Rebound to $90.61 — Inflation Risk Reversing Rate Cut Expectations
title.zh: 油价反弹至 $90.61——通胀风险逆转降息预期

description.en: WTI crude rebounded from $82.59 to $90.61 (+9.7% off lows) as the Middle East ceasefire approaches expiration. This is a significant development: higher oil prices mean higher inflation, which means the Fed cannot cut rates even if it wanted to. Last week's rate cut probability above 50% is now being reversed. The combination of rising yields + rising oil + rising VIX is a classic stagflation setup — the worst possible macro environment for equities. Trump's Polymarket firing probability at 13% and rising adds further uncertainty.
description.zh: 随着中东停火接近到期，WTI 原油从 $82.59 反弹至 $90.61（从低点 +9.7%）。这是重大进展：油价上涨意味着通胀上升，这意味着美联储即使想降息也无法降息。上周超过 50% 的降息概率现在正在被逆转。收益率上升 + 油价上升 + VIX 上升的组合是经典的滞胀格局——对股市最不利的宏观环境。Trump 在 Polymarket 上的解雇概率为 13% 且上升，增加了进一步的不确定性。

title.en: Breadth Deterioration + European Contagion — Global Risk-Off
title.zh: 广度恶化 + 欧洲传染——全球风险规避

description.en: Breadth has slipped from 60% back to approximately 57%. Russell 2000 led declines at -1.00% — small caps are the canary in the coal mine for liquidity stress. Financials are the worst-performing sector YTD at -3.93%. European markets declined 1%+ for two consecutive days, signaling that the risk-off is not just a US story. When breadth deteriorates and small caps lead declines, it historically precedes larger corrections in the broad market. The WSJ 'Bad Breadth' warning is being confirmed in real time.
description.zh: 广度从 60% 滑落至约 57%。Russell 2000 领跌 -1.00%——小盘股是流动性压力的金丝雀。金融板块是年初至今表现最差的板块，跌幅 -3.93%。欧洲市场连续两天下跌 1%+，表明风险规避不只是美国的故事。当广度恶化且小盘股领跌时，历史上往往先于大盘更大幅度的回调。《华尔街日报》的「广度不足」警告正在实时被确认。

description.en: Three active divergences: (1) S&P above 7,000 but breadth at 57% — price is not confirmed by participation. (2) VIX surging but pre-market futures showing +0.4% bounce — volatility and price are telling different stories. (3) Oil rising to $90.61 but market still pricing rate cuts — inflation and monetary policy expectations are contradicting each other. These contradictions cannot coexist indefinitely. The resolution will likely be a repricing of rate cut expectations downward, which is negative for equities at 20.9x P/E.
description.zh: 三个活跃的背离：（1）标普在 7,000 以上但广度在 57%——价格没有得到参与度确认。（2）VIX 飙升但盘前期货显示 +0.4% 反弹——波动率和价格在讲不同的故事。（3）油价上升至 $90.61 但市场仍在定价降息——通胀和货币政策预期相互矛盾。这些矛盾不能无限期共存。解决方案很可能是降息预期向下重新定价，这对 20.9 倍市盈率的股市是负面的。

references.title: Market Data — SPX, DJI, BTC, Gold, VIX
Will Trump fire Powell before July 2026?
